overview: RENEWL is a physician-led longevity practice offering precision hormone optimization, peptide therapy, IV infusions, and advanced diagnostics. All protocols are medically supervised and individualized based on comprehensive clinical evaluation.
highlights: Physician-supervised protocols by board-certified specialist in regenerative medicine
IV infusion therapy (Myers Cocktail, NAD+, Glutathione, Immunity Boost)
DEXA scans and comprehensive laboratory testing
targetAudience: Southeast Michigan residents seeking personalized, physician-supervised longevity and hormone optimization.
